columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: The timestamp (UTC) when the audit log event occurred.

columns.name: Timestamp_d
columns.description: Original Unix epoch seconds of the event.

columns.name: SourceIP_s
columns.description: IP address of the client that triggered the event.

columns.name: Event_s
columns.description: Audit log event type identifier (e.g., stack-created, member-added).

columns.name: UserName_s
columns.description: Display name of the user who performed the action.

columns.name: UserLogin_s
columns.description: GitHub login of the user who performed the action.

columns.name: UserAvatarUrl_s
columns.description: Avatar URL of the user who performed the action.

columns.name: TokenID_s
columns.description: ID of the access token used, if applicable.

columns.name: TokenName_s
columns.description: Name of the access token used, if applicable.

columns.name: ActorName_s
columns.description: Display name of a non-human actor (e.g., deploy token).

columns.name: ActorUrn_s
columns.description: Pulumi URN of a non-human actor.

columns.name: RequireOrgAdmin_b
columns.description: Whether the action required organization admin privileges.

columns.name: RequireStackAdmin_b
columns.description: Whether the action required stack admin privileges.

columns.name: AuthFailure_b
columns.description: Whether the event represents a failed authentication attempt.
